checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-owner-permission-k76wnm(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_owner_permission_k76wnm\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?charterCases < 10)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?provenCases < 8 \|\| provenCases > charterCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?revocationCases < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?authorityGaps > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The decision applies Owner Permission to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Owner Permission.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using record and controlling plus specific case evidence.
